questions.name: C++ - OOP: Constructor Initialization List
questions.questiontext: Write the missing part of the constructor (initialization list) so that the variable id is assigned the passed value n. Your answer must not contain extra spaces.

questions.name: C++ - OOP: Function Override
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code. Write a single line that correctly overrides the method f in the derived class so that it returns the base function result multiplied by 2. Your answer must not contain extra spaces.
